cases.text: The cat sits on the mat. It is small.
One Monday afternoon, Mike, adopting a very unusual style, wore a hoody. Nobody would ever think of wearing a hoody on a very hot day. His friends also wondered why he was being weird.

One Monday afternoon, Mike, adopting a very unusual style, wore a hoody. Nobody would ever think of wearing a hoody on a very hot day. His friends also wondered why he was being weird. They became a little aloof with Mike that day.

—Are you finally done with your hoody fashion?
—What hoody fashion?
—Last week, everyday, you kept on wearing a hoody.
